title: Dice Merge Challenges
description: Do you crave explosive puzzle action? Dive into Dice Merge Challenges, a game that blends strategic merging with thrilling destruction! Dice Merge Challenges offers intuitive gameplay thats easy to pick up. But as you progress, the challenges become more mind-bending! Combine dice with identical numbers to trigger an explosion. Each blast creates a new dice with a higher value. Strategically merge your dice to overpower obstacles and shatter every box! Are you ready to become the ultimate Dice Merge Champion?
instructions: Click on drop buttons or Press Space Button to Drop
